answers.answer: B) Require a client-generated idempotency key; store it on the first request and return the cached result on retries. Reason: This is the standard idempotency pattern for payment APIs. Client generates unique key (e.g., UUID) per charge attempt. Server stores key with response result. Retries with same key return cached result without re-executing the charge. Other options fail: A) Same amount could be legitimate multiple purchases; C) Lock prevents concurrency but not retries; D) Delay does not prevent duplicate charges.

OpenAPI 3.0 Documentation (YAML):

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Organization API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: API for managing organizations and members

servers:
  - url: https://api.example.com

security:
  - BearerAuth: []

components:
  securitySchemes:
    BearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer

  schemas:
    Organization:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
        plan:
          type: string
          enum: [free, pro, enterprise]
        domain:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Member:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        userId:
          type: string
        orgId:
          type: string
        role:
          type: string
          enum: [admin, member, viewer]

    Error:
      type: object
      properties:
        error:
          type: string
        code:
          type: string

paths:
  /api/v1/organizations:
    post:
      summary: Create a new organization
      tags: [Organizations]
      security:
        - BearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [name, plan]
              properties:
                name:
                  type: string
                  minLength: 1
                plan:
                  type: string
                  enum: [free, pro, enterprise]
                domain:
                  type: string
                  nullable: true
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Organization created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
        '400':
          description: Invalid input
        '409':
          description: Domain already taken
      x-rateLimit:
        requests: 100
        period: minute

  /api/v1/organizations/{orgId}/members:
    get:
      summary: List organization members
      tags: [Members]
      parameters:
        - name: orgId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: page
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 1
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema:
            type: integer
            default: 20
            maximum: 100
        - name: role
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [admin, member, viewer]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Members listed
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  data:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: object
                  total:
                    type: integer
                  page:
                    type: integer
                  totalPages:
                    type: integer
        '404':
          description: Organization not found
      x-rateLimit:
        requests: 100
        period: minute

  /api/v1/organizations/{orgId}/members/{userId}/role:
    put:
      summary: Update member role
      tags: [Members]
      parameters:
        - name: orgId
          in: path
          required: true
        - name: userId
          in: path
          required: true
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [role]
              properties:
                role:
                  type: string
                  enum: [admin, member, viewer]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Role updated
        '403':
          description: Forbidden (changing own role or last admin)
        '404':
          description: User not a member
      x-rateLimit:
        requests: 100
        period: minute
```

Key elements included: Bearer token auth, request/response schemas, error schemas (400/403/404/409), pagination (page/limit/total/totalPages), rate limits (100 req/min), enum validations, required fields.
